controls.title: Privacy policies and procedures
controls.text: The organisation shall establish, document and implement policies and procedures to ensure compliance with applicable privacy legislation, regulations and contracts.
controls.evidence_expectation: PIMS policy; privacy procedure documents; review records
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify PIMS policies align with GDPR/DPDP; check reviewed within 12 months

controls.title: Identify and document purpose
controls.text: The organisation shall identify and document the specific purposes for which PII will be processed.
controls.evidence_expectation: ROPA with documented purposes; processing agreements; purpose limitation evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Review ROPA for purpose completeness; verify no secondary processing without new basis

controls.title: Determine when and how consent is obtained
controls.text: The organisation shall provide PII principals with clear and easily accessible information about choices related to their PII and determine and document the mechanism to obtain consent.
controls.evidence_expectation: Consent UI mockups/screenshots; consent database schema; withdrawal process documentation
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify consent is granular and withdrawal is easy; check consent records retained

controls.title: Provide information about privacy processing to PII principals
controls.text: The organisation shall provide PII principals with sufficient information about the organisation's PII processing activities in order to allow them to understand their rights.
controls.evidence_expectation: External privacy notice; data subject rights FAQ; language accessibility evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Check notice covers all required elements; verify accessible format; test rights request process

controls.title: Identify basis for PII transfer
controls.text: The organisation shall identify and document the relevant legal, regulatory or other basis for transfers of PII to third parties.
controls.evidence_expectation: Data transfer agreements; SCCs or BCRs; third-party processor register
controls.assessment_procedure: Review transfer mechanisms for adequacy; verify SCCs up to date; check processor agreements in place
